message:
feat(embed): add multi-model ONNX embedder support via OnnxEmbedderConfig

Generalize FastEmbedEmbedder beyond the hardcoded MiniLM model to support
arbitrary ONNX embedding models with configurable dimensions and pooling.

- Add OnnxEmbedderConfig struct with embedder_id, model_id, dimension,
  and pooling fields, plus a for_name() factory recognizing three models:
  minilm (384d), snowflake-arctic-s (384d), nomic-embed (768d)
- Add load_with_config() constructor as the primary flexible entry point;
  existing load_with_name() now delegates to it with default MiniLM config
- Store per-instance dimension field instead of using DEFAULT_DIMENSION
  constant, fixing dimension checks in embed, embed_batch, and the
  Embedder trait impl to use self.dimension
- Update Debug impl and tracing log messages to reflect per-instance values
- Re-export OnnxEmbedderConfig from crate root
- Add unit tests for config defaults, known model lookup, and unknown
  model rejection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
